---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the specification or reference materials
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Location

- **File(s)**: (e.g., `spec/tool-contracts.md`, Section 3.1)
- **Conformance Level**: (if applicable)

## Expected Behavior

What the specification should say or how it should behave.

## Actual Behavior

What the specification currently says or how it currently behaves.

## Impact

- [ ] Normative text is incorrect
- [ ] Non-normative text is incorrect
- [ ] Formatting or editorial issue
- [ ] Broken link or reference
- [ ] Inconsistency between documents

## Proposed Fix

If you have a suggested correction, describe it here.

## Additional Context

Any additional information, references, or screenshots.
